span.p: Current model is struggling on a task

span.p:
Raise the reasoning/thinking level on the SAME model
cheapest lever; re-run before changing SKU

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Already at max reasoning on the current tier?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the latency/cost budget allow a bigger SKU?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Escalate one tier up
balanced -> top frontier; accept the cost premium for the hard tail

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reshape the task, not the model
narrow scope, add context, decompose into steps
